corrected_fields.macro_context: This report is the Federal Reserve's semi-annual assessment of U.S. financial system stability. The monitoring framework has been refined over time to assess four vulnerability categories: asset valuations, borrowing, leverage, and funding risks. The April 2025 report reflects data available through April 11, 2025, providing an updated view on systemic vulnerabilities approximately 11 months after the prior report. Historical comparison would require access to the previous Financial Stability Report (likely November 2024) to assess how vulnerability levels have evolved.
